description_long: This is a stylized goblin-like doll with a large, bald, green head featuring exaggerated facial features such as a long pointed nose, prominent cheekbones, and a scraggly black beard. The doll has large, pointed ears that stick out to the sides and wide, round eyes with dark pupils, giving it a slightly menacing or startled appearance. Its body is dressed in a short-sleeved, gray, textured shirt that appears worn and dirty, paired with black pants and black boots with yellow soles. The skin of the doll is textured to resemble rough, cracked, green leather or rubber, adding to its fantasy creature aesthetic. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the hands are claw-like with long fingers. The overall build is cartoonish and slightly disproportionate, with a large head and small body, making it visually striking and suitable as a collectible or toy.
description: A green goblin-like doll with a large head, pointed ears, and exaggerated facial features, dressed in a worn gray shirt, black pants, and boots.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated nose, pointed ear, scraggly beard, and profile of the boots.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, startled eyes, both pointed ears, outstretched arms, and full facial details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the profile with visible nose, ear, and beard, but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both pointed ears, the back of the shirt with visible dirt marks, and the boots.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual, worn short-sleeved gray shirt with visible dirt marks, plain black pants, and black boots with yellow soles; no visible patterns or brand influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide-eyed, frowning expression with raised eyebrows and a slightly open mouth, conveying a startled or menacing look.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair on the scalp; features a short, scraggly black beard on the chin.
